projectDescription: Shob is an AI agent workspace and CLI tool that lets developers run parallel AI-powered coding and automation sessions from a single environment, with support for multiple AI providers, MCP servers, custom agents, and a plugin system.
keyFeatures: Parallel AI agent sessions — run multiple AI-powered workflows simultaneously within the same project
Smart permission system — review and approve commands, file access, and code changes before they execute
Deep Git integration — agents understand repository state, active branch, and local changes
Subagent delegation — break large tasks into pieces and delegate to specialized subagents
Multi-provider support — connect Anthropic, OpenAI, and other AI providers
MCP (Model Context Protocol) support — add local and remote MCP tool servers
Custom agents — define specialized agents with specific tools, prompts, and permissions
Plugin system — extend Shob with custom tools, auth hooks, and provider integrations
Headless server mode — run Shob as a background HTTP server for programmatic access
JavaScript SDK — programmatically control Shob sessions and automation workflows
Desktop app — full Electron-based GUI with file tree, terminal, and diff viewer
Skills — reusable agent workflows for brainstorming, research, UI/UX, and more
GitHub agent — automated PR and issue handling via GitHub Actions or CLI
Session sharing — share sessions via a public share URL
publicApiSurface: shob run [message] — run a one-shot AI agent with a message
shob serve — start a headless Shob HTTP server
shob session list / delete — manage sessions
shob mcp add / list / auth / logout / debug — manage MCP servers
shob agent create / list — manage custom agents
shob providers auth / list — authenticate AI providers
shob github install / run — GitHub agent integration
shob pr <number> — fetch and run Shob on a GitHub PR
createOpencodeClient(config) — create an SDK client connected to a Shob server
createOpencodeServer(options) — spawn a Shob server process programmatically
createOpencode(options) — convenience function to create both server and client
createOpencodeTui(options) — launch Shob TUI process programmatically
Plugin Hooks: event, config, tool, auth, provider, chat.message, chat.params, permission.ask, shell.env, tool.execute.before, tool.execute.after
Agent.Info schema — name, description, mode, tools, model, prompt, permission, steps
Config schema — providers, mcp, agents, plugins, logLevel, model, keybindings
